findings.location: s9 / 更新系テストデータ記述例 — EXPECTED_TABLE example
findings.description: The source EXPECTED_TABLE example for the update test contains a `// CHAR(5) VARCHAR(64) BOOLEAN` row in the expected data table, demonstrating a type annotation syntax that can be embedded in EXPECTED_TABLE data. This syntax is not captured anywhere in the knowledge file. An AI assistant asked about type annotations in test data would have no basis for answering.
findings.source_evidence: Source EXPECTED_TABLE=EMPLOYEE example shows a row ` // CHAR(5)  VARCHAR(64)   BOOLEAN` between the column header row and the data rows.
